title: micrococca mercurialis
intro: Micrococca mercurialis, also known as Mercury Weed, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal and poisonous properties. The plant contains cardiac glycosides and other compounds with potential health benefits. In traditional medicine, Micrococca mercurialis is used to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and grinding the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications to reap its medicinal benefits.
